title: bistorta albiflora
intro: Bistorta albiflora, also known as white bistort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Polygonaceae family, characterized by its white flowers and edible roots. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bistorta albiflora include its potential to treat various conditions such as digestive issues, wounds, and skin problems. Bistorta albiflora can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
